_note: Photoreal 'casual smartphone photo' scenes per pillar for Gemini-generated photo posts (bin/generate-day.js). Effective pool = scenes x _variations, so the 45-day scene-dedup window (lib/dedup.js) never starves. NO people/faces, NO text/logos — must look like a normal person's home photo, not a branded graphic.

a windowsill lined with solar garden lights brought indoors
